commits.subject: feat(dcf): pre-FPS object_query_points for mixed-object batches

acp_jobs.role: exp_a — 1 seq × oversample 256, 4 GPU bs=4, L1, 2000 steps
exp_b — full subject-01 (100 seq), 4 GPU bs=4, L1, 2000 steps

tasks_completed.summary: Memory probe (ACP pt-xt073hk1): per-rank peak [1:16.6, 2:23.9, 4:38.5] GiB; bs=6 StopIteration exposed 5-sample-per-object cap
Pre-FPS refactor — object_query_points [N_o=256,3] produced in dataset; DCFBranch / STream3R.forward accept the new kwarg; --oversample-manifest flag added
exp_a (ACP pt-ag5bls6q): 1 seq × oversample 256, 4 GPU bs=4, L1, 2000 steps — hand L2 11.84 / obj L2 9.19 mm
exp_b (ACP pt-9m0owmfc): full subject-01 (100 seq), 4 GPU bs=4, L1, 2000 steps — hand L2 21.46 / obj L2 50.07 mm
Published experiment page + camera-view overlay MP4s (63 frames / 10 fps) to tracking site

tasks_pending.summary: Re-run exp_b at 8000+ steps (4× current budget) to disambiguate convergence vs. inherent multi-seq regression before committing to architectural fixes
Survey /mnt/afs/haonan/hoi3r/sam-3d-objects — mesh output format / interface / cost; sanity-check on one DexYCB frame: can its chamfer beat exp_b's 61 mm?
Prototype pose-only object head conditioned on sam-3d-objects mesh (object_query_points supplied from the generator); compare to exp_a/exp_b ceiling
Object-frame loss (rigid-align pred→GT in canonical mesh frame before L1) to decouple shape from pose in the current exp_b-style regression
Diagnose approach-phase hand degradation — per-frame hand L2 spikes 30–50 mm in the first ~10 frames of 141754 for both exps; no hypothesis yet

caveats: exp_a training hand L1 /coord is <0.01 mm — it memorized the 1 sequence; exp_a metrics are a ceiling, not generalization evidence.
exp_b eval is on the first sequence of subject-01 (trained on), not a held-out sequence — the 21.5 mm hand L2 is still train-set performance, not a test number.
exp_b at 2000 steps may not have converged (train hand loss still 0.012–0.018 with high variance); before attributing the gap to architecture, run the longer budget.
Debug container assertions during the smoke (NVML_SUCCESS) are a container-side issue — ACP nodes are clean (recorded as feedback memory).
L1-only hand loss (no chamfer) differs from the 2026-04-17 multi-seq grouped ref (l1+chamfer). The comparison is with today's exp_a, not that reference.
resume_prompt: Read the sidecar at https://haonanhe.github.io/HOI3R-project-tracking/updates/2026-04-18-session-summary-prefps-exp-a-vs-b.json and continue from the first pending task.
